name: Deep Dish Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
3. In a medium bowl, blend the melted butter, sugars, and vanilla extract.
4. Add eggs; using a spoon, beat well until combined.
5. Combine flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt in another small bowl.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture, beating until well blended.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until the brownies begin to pull away from the sides of the pan.
9. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting into squares (16 pieces).
